items.situation: student asking about gym or sports facility hours
items.speaker: Why does the pool close so early on weekends?

options.A: Beats me, I've wondered that too.
options.B: The pool was just repainted last month.
options.C: Swimming is great exercise for everyone.
options.D: Every hour on the half hour.

items.explanation: 正确答案A使用习语"Beats me"（意为"我也不知道"），自然地表达说话者同样不清楚原因，符合idiomatic范式。B是语义联想陷阱，借用"pool"谈论油漆翻新，没有回答原因。C是泛泛陈述游泳的好处，与提问完全无关，属于off-topic。D回答的是"多久一次/时间"，答非所问，属于wrong_question_type。

items.speaker: I really wanted to see that movie this weekend.

options.B: I'll grab tickets for us right now.
options.C: Movies are too expensive these days.
options.D: Yes, I watched it last night.

items.explanation: 正确答案B不直接回应"想看电影"这句话，而是主动解决潜在需求——立刻去买票，符合context_shift范式。A是语义联想陷阱，借"movie"谈论电影院本身，没有帮上忙。C是泛泛抱怨电影票价，属off-topic。D说"我昨晚看了"，误解了说话者的意图（对方是想去看，不是问别人看没看），属于misinterpretation。

items.situation: asking for directions to a nearby location
items.speaker: Do you know how to get to the train station?

options.A: The train was late again this morning.
options.B: Yes, I take the train every day.
options.C: Are you walking or driving there?
options.D: Trains are a great way to travel.

items.explanation: 正确答案C用反问"你是走路还是开车"推进对话，因为路线取决于交通方式，符合counter_question范式。A是语义联想陷阱，借"train"谈论火车晚点，没回答怎么走。B说"我每天坐火车"虽含"yes"但谈的是乘车经历，不是路线，属off-topic。D是泛泛评价火车旅行，与问路无关，属off-topic。

items.situation: friend inviting another to a study group or social event
items.speaker: What do you say we join the study group tonight?

options.A: The group meets in the library basement.
options.B: I studied really hard for that exam.
options.C: Saying nice things is always good.

items.explanation: 正确答案D用习语"count me in"（算我一个）爽快接受邀请，符合idiomatic范式。A是语义联想陷阱，借"group"谈论小组地点，没回应邀请。B说"我为考试努力学习"借"study"转向无关往事，属off-topic。C把"what do you say"误解成字面"说话"的含义，属于polysemy陷阱。

items.speaker: How about we move my appointment to Friday?

options.B: The clinic is across from the bank.
options.C: I moved into my new place on Friday.

items.explanation: 正确答案A用口语习语"Works for me"表示同意改期，符合idiomatic范式。B是语义联想陷阱，借"appointment/clinic"谈论诊所位置，没回应改期。C把"move"误用为"搬家"的含义，属于polysemy陷阱。D是泛泛评价医生很忙，与改期无关，属off-topic。

items.situation: two classmates discussing a group project deadline
items.speaker: Have you finished your part of the project yet?

options.A: The project topic is really interesting.
options.B: Almost, just polishing the last slide.
options.C: Yes, I finished my coffee already.
options.D: How many parts are there total?

items.explanation: 正确答案B以话语标记"Almost"开头，间接回应进度并说明还差最后一张幻灯片，符合marker_led_indirect范式。A是语义联想陷阱，借"project"谈论选题有趣，没回答进度。C用"finished"但接的是"咖啡"，属于polysemy/误解陷阱。D反问"一共几部分"答非所问，属于wrong_question_type。

items.situation: acknowledging someone's unavailability or schedule conflict
items.speaker: I can't make it to dinner on Saturday.

options.B: No, I haven't seen him today.
options.C: Well, maybe we can try Sunday instead.

items.explanation: 正确答案C以话语标记"Well"开头，间接提出改到周日的替代方案，符合marker_led_indirect范式。A是语义联想陷阱，借"dinner"夸赞上次饭菜，没回应日程冲突。B答非所问，回答的是"见没见某人"，属于wrong_question_type/off-topic。D说"餐厅订满了"借"dinner"转向无关信息，属off-topic。

items.situation: student asking a professor about office hours or assignment
items.speaker: Where can I drop off my assignment?

options.B: It's due by Friday at noon.
options.C: I dropped my pen on the floor.
options.D: Actually, just leave it on my desk.

items.explanation: 正确答案D以话语标记"Actually"开头，间接指明放在我桌上即可，符合marker_led_indirect范式。A是语义联想陷阱，借"assignment"评价作业很难，没回答地点。B回答的是"何时截止"，答非所问，属于wrong_question_type。C把"drop"误用为"掉落"的含义，属于polysemy陷阱。
